momentumClientId.tooltipText: NowCerts/Momentum AMS insured database_id — dedup key

fein.tooltipText: Federal Employer Identification Number — commercial accounts only

intelRun.tooltipText: Whether an intel pack has been run on this account

intelUnderwritingFlag.tooltipText: Underwriting risk flags — may trigger declination or surplus lines

assessmentDate.tooltipText: When Viktor last ran a full intelligence assessment on this account

riskScore.tooltipText: AI-generated risk score from Viktor assessment

coverageGaps.tooltipText: AI-identified coverage gaps from Viktor assessment

keyFindings.tooltipText: Full narrative intel written by Viktor

intelSources.tooltipText: Comma-separated list of sources checked: LinkedIn, BBB, News, Website

accountScore.tooltipText: Auto-calculated from policy count, premium, LOB diversity, tenure, and active ratio

youthfulDriverFlag.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — true if any dependent age 16-25

totalAnnualPremium.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — sum of all active policy premiums

policyCountActive.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — count of active policies

gapCount.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — total true gap flags

nextRenewalDate.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — earliest policy expiration

outreachAttemptsCurrent.tooltipText: Reset each renewal cycle by n8n

gbEligibleEmployees.tooltipText: Total number of eligible employees in the group

gbLifeBenefitAmount.tooltipText: Basic life benefit amount per employee

gbVoluntaryBenefits.tooltipText: Aflac, voluntary life, accident, critical illness, etc.

momentumClientId.tooltipText: NowCerts/Momentum AMS insured database_id — used as sync dedup key

csrName.tooltipText: Assigned CSR from Momentum AMS (csrName field)

contactDriveFolderUrl.tooltipText: Optional override — contact-specific Google Drive folder URL

aepSepDate.tooltipText: Annual Enrollment Period or Special Enrollment Period date

lifeReviewDate.tooltipText: Last date life insurance review was completed

aiSummary.tooltipText: Pre-call intel from Manus prospect intelligence pack

intelPackRun.tooltipText: Checked when Manus prospect-intelligence-pack has run for this lead

amount.tooltipText: Auto-populated from Est. Premium. Do not edit directly.

lineOfBusiness.tooltipText: Line of Business — locked after first save. Create a new Opportunity to change LOB.

effectiveDate.tooltipText: Policy effective date — entered at bind

fein.tooltipText: Enter if Account not yet created

aiSummary.tooltipText: 2-3 sentence brief from Manus intel — pre-call context

policyStubId.tooltipText: ID of the auto-created Policy stub when Won-Bound

commissionLogged.tooltipText: Auto-set by n8n when commission ledger entry created

chkDecPageDelivered.tooltipText: Personal Lines — dec page delivered to client

taskSource.tooltipText: Where this task was created from — enables Account rollup

linkedAccount.tooltipText: Parent account — all tasks roll up to this account

name.tooltipText: Subject — short description of the interaction

classification.tooltipText: Required for emails and calls — enables filtering and reporting

direction.tooltipText: For calls: Outbound (we called) / Inbound (they called)

notes.tooltipText: Call notes, email snippet, or intel summary

loggedBy.tooltipText: User name for manual, system name (n8n / Manus) for automated

followUpTask.tooltipText: If filled, auto-creates a Task linked to this account on save

producer.tooltipText: Auto-populated from source record Assigned User — Lamar / Gretchen

writtenPremium.tooltipText: Auto-populated from Policy premiumAmount or Renewal renewalPremium

commissionRate.tooltipText: Auto-populated from Policy commissionRate — flagged if missing

estimatedCommission.tooltipText: Auto-calculated: writtenPremium x commissionRate — $0 and flagged if rate missing

postedAmount.tooltipText: Manually entered when carrier payment received

variancePercent.tooltipText: Auto-calculated: variance / estimatedCommission — flags large discrepancies

expectedPaymentDate.tooltipText: Manually entered or defaulted to 30 days after effective date

overdueFlag.tooltipText: Auto-set when status = Estimated AND expected payment date > 30 days past

name.tooltipText: Policy number — used as record name/title

momentumPolicyId.tooltipText: NowCerts/Momentum AMS policy databaseId — primary dedup key for sync. NEVER change this value once set.

lineOfBusiness.tooltipText: Raw string from Momentum — may contain multiple LOBs comma-separated

expirationDate.tooltipText: Renewal trigger date — used by renewal pipeline automation

insuredMomentumId.tooltipText: insuredDatabaseId from Momentum — used to resolve Account/Contact relation during sync

premiumAtRisk.tooltipText: Annual premium value at risk if policy lapses — used by renewal outreach automation

urgency.tooltipText: Auto-calculated by n8n renewal workflow based on days to expiration

lastContactMethod.tooltipText: Set by renewal outreach automation after each email send

lastContactDate.tooltipText: Set by renewal outreach automation after each contact attempt

emailSequenceStarted.tooltipText: Set to true by renewal outreach automation after first email sent

renewals.tooltipText: Renewal pipeline records for this expiring policy

renewedFrom.tooltipText: Renewal records where this is the new/renewed policy

newPolicy.tooltipText: The renewed policy record once bound

renewalPremium.tooltipText: Manually entered when quote is received — blank until then

lineOfBusiness.tooltipText: Auto-populated from linked Policy — not editable

urgency.tooltipText: Auto-calculated: Critical <30 days, High 30-60, Medium 60-90, Low 90+. Manual override respected.

renewalNotes.tooltipText: Free text notes for this renewal cycle

params.fontFamily: Plus Jakarta Sans, Avenir Next, -apple-system, sans-serif
